# Subscription Pricing Changes

Acme Shop values customer satisfaction by maintaining transparent pricing structures for subscription services. Customers will receive at least 30 days' notice via email for any upcoming price increases, allowing them time to decide on their subscriptions. New pricing takes effect in the following billing cycle after the change, while any decreases in price are applied automatically. The company also aims to mitigate impacts of external pricing factors and offers customer support for any inquiries related to subscription pricing changes.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-pricing-changes]
